dvids.title: U.S. Disables 2 More Vessels Violating Blockade in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. forces disabled M/T Sea Star III and M/T Sevda, May 8, prior to both vessels entering an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman in violation of the ongoing U.S. blockade.

dvids.title: U.S. Disables 2 More Vessels Violating Blockade in Gulf of Oman
